About ScanAnalyzer

Google Drive → OneDrive Migration Analysis Tool

🎯 What is ScanAnalyzer?

ScanAnalyzer is a browser-based migration analysis tool built for Google Drive to OneDrive migration teams. It instantly parses Microsoft Migration Manager scan reports and gives a full per-user breakdown — saving 2-3 hours of manual Excel work per wave.

⚡ How it works
1
Export scan report ZIP from Microsoft Migration Manager
2
Click Upload Scan Report → select wave name → select file
3
Wave card created → click it → select a user → view full dashboard, charts, and insights
4
Export to Excel or generate client email in one click
📊 Key Features
Per-user data breakdown
4-tier risk badges (Normal / Medium / Medium-High / Heavy)
Google Workspace conversion highlights
File format breakdown with charts
Excel export with 5 sheets
Client email generator
Full data grid — filter, sort, export CSV
Supports multi-user scan reports
SharePoint history tracking
Light / Dark mode
🔒 Privacy & Security
✅ What stays on your laptop
Raw scan data · File paths · User details · Browser history
📤 What saves to SharePoint
Wave name · File name · User count · Total size · Total files

No scan file content ever leaves the browser. GitHub Pages only serves the HTML file — it has no server, no database, and cannot receive any data.

⚙️ Technology
HTML5 + CSS3 + JavaScript Chart.js 4.4.1 AG Grid Community 31.3.2 PapaParse 5.4.1 JSZip 3.10.1 SheetJS 0.18.5 Power Automate SharePoint List GitHub Pages (hosting) 3.3 MB self-contained
ScanAnalyzer v1.0 · Built by Kanigolla, Rama Sai Avinash (Cognizant) · June 2026
